audit_items.proof_trace: Memory allocated via calloc() at line 432 is never freed on any return path. Function has two exit paths (break at L449, normal end at L463) but neither calls free(st.page_data), violating the API contract and causing a memory leak.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Repeated calls to _evict_page() will continuously allocate memory without freeing it, leading to memory exhaustion and potential denial of service.
